class_name: Approaching [something] with your camera
old_action_anchor: A camera moves steadily closer to a target object.
old_phase_cues: Camera starts at a distance from the object.
Camera moves forward, filling the frame with the object.
Camera stops close, object dominates the view.
new_action_anchor: The camera moves toward the target so it grows larger in view.
new_phase_cues: camera starts at a distance from target
camera moves forward toward target
camera stops closer with target larger in frame
new_confusion_cues: Moving away from [something] with your camera

class_name: Laying [something] on the table on its side, not upright
old_action_anchor: A person places an object horizontally on a table surface.
new_action_anchor: A hand places an object on the table so it rests on its side.
new_phase_cues: hand carries object above table
object is lowered with its side toward the table
object rests sideways on the table surface

class_name: Letting [something] roll along a flat surface
old_action_anchor: A person releases an object, letting it roll forward on a flat surface.
new_action_anchor: A hand releases an object and it rolls forward while staying on a flat surface.
new_phase_cues: hand positions object on flat surface
hand releases and object begins rolling forward
object remains on the flat surface farther away

class_name: Letting [something] roll down a slanted surface
old_action_anchor: A hand releases an object on a slanted surface, and it rolls downward.
new_action_anchor: A hand releases an object and it rolls downward along a slope.
new_phase_cues: hand places object on upper part of slope
hand releases object and it rolls downhill
object reaches a lower point after rolling down slope

class_name: Moving [something] across a surface until it falls down
old_action_anchor: A hand pushes [something] horizontally until it slides off an edge.
old_phase_cues: hand makes contact with object on surface
object falls off edge to lower level
new_action_anchor: A hand pushes an object across a surface until it leaves support and falls.
new_phase_cues: object starts supported on the surface
object is pushed across the surface toward an edge
object leaves the surface and falls down
new_confusion_cues: Moving [something] across a surface without it falling down
Pushing [something] so that it almost falls off but doesn't

class_name: Moving [something] across a surface without it falling down
old_action_anchor: A hand pushes an object along a flat surface without lifting it.
old_phase_cues: object stops while still on surface
new_action_anchor: A hand pushes an object across a surface and it stays supported.
new_phase_cues: object starts supported on the surface
object is pushed across the surface
object stops while remaining supported on the surface
new_confusion_cues: Moving [something] across a surface until it falls down
Pushing [something] so that it falls off the table

class_name: Moving [something] and [something] so they collide with each other
Moving away from [something] with your camera
old_action_anchor: The camera moves backward while keeping [something] in frame.
new_action_anchor: The camera moves backward so the target becomes smaller in view.
new_phase_cues: camera starts close to target
camera moves backward away from target
camera stops farther away with target smaller in frame

class_name: Plugging [something] into [something]
old_action_anchor: A hand inserts a plug into a socket.
old_phase_cues: plug tip aligning with socket holes
new_action_anchor: A hand aligns a plug with an opening and inserts it until it stays inside.
new_phase_cues: hand holds plug near opening
plug tip aligns and enters the opening
plug remains inserted inside the opening

class_name: Pouring [something] into [something]
old_action_anchor: A person tilts a container to transfer liquid into another container.
new_action_anchor: A hand tilts a source container so its contents flow into a target container.
new_phase_cues: source is held above target container
source tilts and contents flow into target
contents settle inside the target container

class_name: Pretending or failing to wipe [something] off of [something]
old_action_anchor: A person moves a hand or cloth over a surface without removing anything.
new_action_anchor: A hand or cloth moves across a surface, but nothing is removed from it.
new_phase_cues: hand approaches marked surface
wiping motion moves across the surface
surface remains unchanged after wiping

class_name: Pretending or trying and failing to twist [something]
old_action_anchor: A person attempts to twist an object but it doesn't turn.
old_phase_cues: hand approaches object with twisting intent
applies rotational force with visible effort
new_action_anchor: A hand attempts to twist an object, but the object does not turn.
new_phase_cues: hand grasps object
hand applies twisting force with visible effort
object remains unturned after the attempt
new_confusion_cues: Twisting (wringing) [something] wet until water comes out

class_name: Pretending to open [something] without actually opening it
old_action_anchor: A person's hand approaches and touches a closed object without causing it to open.
old_phase_cues: fingers make contact with closure point
hand withdraws with object still closed
new_action_anchor: A hand mimics opening a closure, but the object stays closed.
new_phase_cues: hand reaches closure point
hand performs an opening motion
object remains closed with no opening created

class_name: Pretending to poke [something]
old_action_anchor: A person extends a finger toward [something] without making contact.
new_action_anchor: A finger moves toward the target and stops short without touching it.
new_phase_cues: finger points toward target
hand moves closer without touching
hand stops and withdraws with target unchanged

class_name: Pretending to put [something] on a surface
old_action_anchor: A person mimes placing an object onto a flat surface without actual contact.
old_phase_cues: hand holds imaginary object above surface
hand stops just before surface contact
new_action_anchor: A hand mimics setting an object down but leaves the surface untouched.
new_phase_cues: hand holds object above the surface
hand lowers object toward the surface
hand withdraws before contact and nothing is placed

class_name: Pretending to put [something] onto [something]
old_action_anchor: A person mimes placing an object onto a surface without actual contact.
new_action_anchor: A hand mimics placing an object onto a target without making contact.
new_phase_cues: hand carries object toward target
object hovers just above target
hand pulls away and the target remains unchanged
new_confusion_cues: Pretending to put [something] on a surface

class_name: Pretending to put [something] underneath [something]
old_action_anchor: A person moves an object toward a space below another object without making contact.
old_phase_cues: hand moves object downward toward space below
hand stops before contact with surface
new_action_anchor: A hand moves an object toward the space below another object, but does not place it there.
new_phase_cues: hand approaches the space under target
object moves toward the underside without placement
hand withdraws and nothing remains underneath

class_name: Pretending to spread air onto [something]
old_action_anchor: A person mimes spreading air onto an object with open hands.
old_phase_cues: hands sweep across surface with open palms
new_action_anchor: Open hands fan air toward a target without touching or changing it.
new_phase_cues: hands position above target
hands fan air toward the target
hands withdraw while the target remains unchanged

class_name: Pretending to turn [something] upside down
old_action_anchor: A person holds an object and rotates it 180 degrees without releasing it.
old_phase_cues: person grasps object with both hands
person rotates object 180 degrees in air
person returns object to original orientation
new_action_anchor: A hand mimics inverting an object, but no true upside-down end state is reached.

hand starts an inversion motion
object is not left upside down after the motion

object falls off table to floor

class_name: Putting [something that cannot actually stand upright] upright on the table, so it falls on its side

old_phase_cues: object placed vertically on table surface

new_attribute_cues: covering object separates from hidden object
